data.command: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gt prime --hook && gt mail check --inject

message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-22T14:28 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

content.thinking: All patrol cycles are complete. The hooked wisp (skogtown-wisp-wisp-037x) also has all children closed. I need to squash the completed patrol and create a new one. Let me squash and start a fresh patrol cycle.

content.text: Previous patrol cycles all complete. Squashing and starting a fresh patrol.

content.text: I see rig sessions (aq-refinery, aq-witness, cl-refinery, cl-witness) but `gt status` shows no rigs registered. Let me check if these are orphaned or expected.

input.command: gt rig list 2>/dev/null || echo "No rig list command or no rigs"

content.text:
Rig sessions exist (aq-witness, aq-refinery, cl-witness, cl-refinery) but no rigs are registered. These may be orphaned from a previous configuration. Not taking destructive action — noting for awareness. Numbered sessions (0, 111, 203) appear to be user sessions. hq-boot and hq-mayor are expected Gas Town sessions.

Closing orphan check step.
Patrol count 0, no extraordinary actions. Context is low. Incrementing count and looping.
